statement: In every magma, Equation 2324 (`x = (y * (x * (z * w))) * z`) implies Equation 3482 (`x * x = y * ((y * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0327
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x (op z w))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op (op y x) y))
